name: subscription-autopilot
description: AI agent that runs your recurring x402 service spending on Arc — re-shops at renewal, pays via gasless USDC nanopayments, governed by an out-of-process policy-gated signer (SpendGuard).

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/signer && tsc --noEmit -p packages/agent && tsc --noEmit -p packages/sellers
